message:
Fix memory ordering in Bulkhead acquire methods

Updated `compare_exchange_weak` success orderings from `Ordering::Release` to `Ordering::Acquire` in `try_acquire` and `process_queue_inner`. Since these operations take a permit rather than return one, they must form a synchronize-with edge with the `release_permit` method (which uses `Ordering::Release`) to ensure visibility of preceding memory operations.
